select_channel.title: Select YouTube Channel
select_channel.description: Your account has multiple YouTube channels. Select the one to monitor.

select_monitor_mode.title: Monitor Mode
select_monitor_mode.description: Choose whether to monitor your own channel's live chat or another channel's.

enter_channel_id.title: Enter Channel
enter_channel_id.description: Enter the YouTube channel handle (e.g., @channelname) or channel ID (e.g., UCxxxxxxxx) to monitor.

error.channel_not_found: Channel not found. Please check the channel handle or ID and try again.

abort.already_configured: This YouTube channel is already configured.
abort.no_channel: No YouTube channel found for this account.
abort.api_error: Failed to communicate with the YouTube API. Please check that the YouTube Data API v3 is enabled in your Google Cloud project.
abort.missing_configuration: The integration is not configured. Please follow the documentation.
abort.already_in_progress: Configuration flow is already in progress.
